title: Author’s Note
text: Author’s Note Please note that this book has subjects of traditional surrogacy included in it. I did a lot of thoughtful research on this subject matter and assigned multiple sensitivity readers to it, including surrogates and people who work at surrogacy agencies. I even spoke in-depth with a woman who did traditional surrogacy. And my own experiences of infertility and multiple miscarriages and years of considering our own options of surrogacy made me especially dedicated to making sure I got this story right. But ultimately, this is a work of fiction between two consenting adults and should be read with an open heart and mind. For full legal requirements on becoming a surrogate, please consult the most recent guidelines issued by the American Society for Reproductive Medicine at asrm.org .
